messages.text: Cleansing spirit-waters wash over you, freeing your limbs and steadying your guard.
Cleansing spirit-waters wash over {name}, leaving them refreshed and unbound.
The last of the cleansing waters evaporates from your skin.
The cleansing waters wreathing {name} fade away.
{name} glistens with cleansing spirit-waters, freed of what bound them.
